description: Make VS Code Markdown Preview match GitHub as closely as possible.
command.changeThemeMode.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Theme Mode
command.changeSingleTheme.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Single Theme
command.changeLightTheme.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Day Theme
command.changeDarkTheme.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Night Theme
configuration.theme.mode.description: Select a single theme, or sync with your system and automatically switch between day and night themes
configuration.theme.mode.single.enum.des: GitHub will use your selected theme
configuration.theme.mode.system.enum.des: GitHub theme will match your system active settings
configuration.singleTheme.description: The theme used in single theme mode
configuration.lightTheme.description: This theme will be active when your system is set to “light mode”
configuration.darkTheme.description: This theme will be active when your system is set to “dark mode”
configuration.theme.light.enum.descripti: GitHub's standard light theme with full color contrast and brightness.
configuration.theme.light_colorblind.enu: For people who may find it difficult to distinguish between reds and greens.
For people who need higher contrast between interface elements.
configuration.theme.light_tritanopia.enu: For people who find it difficult to distinguish between blues and greens, as well as yellows and purples.
configuration.theme.dark.enum.descriptio: GitHub's standard dark theme with full color contrast and brightness on a dark background.
configuration.theme.dark_colorblind.enum: For people who may find it difficult to distinguish between reds and greens, with a dark background.
configuration.theme.dark_dimmed.enum.des: A dark theme with reduced contrast for comfortable viewing in low-light environments.
configuration.theme.dark_high_contrast.e: For people who need higher contrast between interface elements, with a dark background.
configuration.theme.dark_tritanopia.enum: For people who find it difficult to distinguish between blues and greens, as well as yellows and purples, with a dark background.
configuration.mermaid.theme.vscode.descr: Automatically match the current VS Code color theme.
configuration.mermaid.theme.base.descrip: The base theme used for creating custom Mermaid themes.
configuration.mermaid.theme.forest.descr: A theme inspired by natural green tones.
configuration.mermaid.theme.dark.descrip: A dark theme optimized for viewing on dark backgrounds.
configuration.mermaid.theme.default.desc: The default Mermaid theme with balanced colors and contrast.
configuration.mermaid.theme.neutral.desc: A neutral theme designed for accessibility and print-friendly output.
configuration.mermaid.lightModeTheme.des: The Mermaid theme to use when GitHub Markdown is displaying a light theme.
configuration.mermaid.darkModeTheme.desc: The Mermaid theme to use when GitHub Markdown is displaying a dark theme.
